info.title: QuantOracle — Quant Finance Calculations
info.description: 77 deterministic quantitative-finance endpoints: options pricing (Black-Scholes + 10 Greeks, implied vol, exotics), risk metrics (VaR/CVaR, Kelly, drawdown, stress tests), portfolio optimization, technical indicators, Monte Carlo simulation, fixed income, statistics (GARCH, Hurst, cointegration), crypto/DeFi (liquidation, impermanent loss, funding), FX, macro, and live crypto market data (real-time volatility + perp funding with historical percentile context). Pure computation — same inputs always return the same outputs. p50 latency ~70 ms.

post.description: Deterministic backtest of SMA crossover, RSI mean reversion, momentum, or Bollinger breakout. Replaces 10+ individual calls.
Convert between APY and APR with configurable compounding frequency.
DEX slippage estimator for constant-product AMM (x*y=k).
Funding rate analysis with annualization and regime detection.
Impermanent loss calculator for Uniswap v2/v3 AMM positions.

One-call risk panel for a leveraged crypto position: liquidation distance,
parametric VaR/CVaR (scaled to your notional), Kelly leverage, the LIVE perp
funding rate + its annual carry on your position, and a synthesized risk-flag
verdict. Replaces firing and stitching crypto/liquidation-price +
risk/var-parametric + risk/kelly + live/funding-rates yourself. PAID composite.

Liquidation price calculator for leveraged positions. Perp positions: funding
erodes collateral over time — pull the live rate from /v1/live/funding-rates.
Portfolio rebalance analyzer: drift detection and trade computation.
Token vesting schedule with cliff, linear/graded unlock, and TGE.
Asian option pricing: geometric closed-form or arithmetic approximation.
Barrier option pricing using analytical formulas.
CRR binomial tree pricing for American and European options.
Lookback option pricing (floating/fixed strike).
Option chain analytics: skew, max pain, put-call ratios.
Put-call parity check and arbitrage detection.
Build implied volatility surface from market data.
Credit spread and Z-spread from bond price vs risk-free curve.
Yield curve interpolation: linear, cubic spline, or Nelson-Siegel.
Full amortization schedule with extra payment savings analysis.
Bond price, Macaulay/modified duration, convexity, DV01.
Currency carry trade P&L decomposition.
Bootstrap forward rates from a spot yield curve.
Interest rate parity calculator with arbitrage detection.
Purchasing power parity fair value estimation.
Rank cheapest effective hedges for a given position. Compares protective puts, collars, inverse hedges.
Average True Range with normalized ATR and volatility regime.
Bollinger Bands with %B, bandwidth, and squeeze detection.
Golden/death cross detection with signal history.
Fibonacci retracement and extension levels.
Trend + volatility regime + composite risk classification.
Combined regime classification: trend, vol, RSI, direction, strategy suggestion. Replaces technical + regime + realized-vol.
13 technical indicators + composite signals.

Live perpetual funding rate + annualized carry for a crypto asset, from a
fresh exchange feed. You supply only the ticker. Cached ~1 min.

Live realized volatility (7d/30d/90d) + regime for a crypto asset, computed
from fresh daily candles. You supply only the ticker — we fetch the data and
run the math. Cached ~5 min.
Convert nominal returns to real returns using Fisher equation.
Real yield and breakeven inflation from nominal yields.
Taylor Rule interest rate prescription.
Newton-Raphson implied volatility solver. Converges in 5-8 iterations.
Multi-leg options payoff diagram data generation.
Scan and rank vertical spreads by risk/reward. Replaces 8-16 individual options/price calls.
Multi-leg options strategy P&L, breakevens, max profit/loss, risk/reward.
Rank top options strategies given market outlook + volatility view. Returns P&L, breakevens, max profit/loss for each.
Complete pairs trading signal: cointegration, Hurst, z-score, half-life, hedge ratio. Replaces 4 individual calls.
Full portfolio health check: risk metrics, correlation, drawdown, rebalance, stress test. Replaces 6 individual calls.
Portfolio optimization: max Sharpe, min vol, or risk parity weights.
Generate trade list to rebalance from current holdings to target weights with transaction cost estimate.
Equal risk contribution portfolio weights.
N x N correlation and covariance matrices from return series.
Drawdown decomposition with underwater curve.
Complete risk tearsheet: Sharpe, Sortino, VaR, Kelly, drawdown, Hurst, CAGR. Replaces 7 individual calls.
Kelly Criterion: discrete (win/loss) or continuous (returns series) mode.
22 risk metrics: Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, Omega, VaR, CVaR, drawdown, skew, kurtosis.
Fixed fractional position sizing with risk/reward targets.
Portfolio stress test across multiple scenarios.
Transaction cost model: commission + spread + market impact estimation.

Parametric Value-at-Risk and Conditional VaR. VaR scales with volatility; for
crypto, feed fresh realized vol from /v1/live/volatility.
GBM Monte Carlo with contributions/withdrawals. Up to 5000 paths.
Engle-Granger cointegration test with hedge ratio and half-life.
Correlation and covariance matrices with optional eigenvalue decomposition.
Fit data to common distributions and rank by goodness of fit.
GARCH(1,1) volatility forecast using maximum likelihood estimation.
Hurst exponent via rescaled range (R/S) analysis.
OLS linear regression with R-squared, t-stats, and standard errors.
Normal distribution: CDF, PDF, quantile, and confidence intervals.
Polynomial regression of degree n with goodness-of-fit metrics.

Probabilistic Sharpe Ratio — is the observed Sharpe statistically significant?
Based on Bailey & Lopez de Prado (2012).
Realized volatility: close-to-close, Parkinson, Garman-Klass, Yang-Zhang from OHLC.
Standalone Sharpe ratio from a returns series.
Rolling and static z-scores with extreme value detection.
Complete trade evaluation: sizing, risk/reward, Kelly, costs, regime, signals. Replaces 5 individual calls.
Compound Annual Growth Rate with optional forward projections.
Future value of a present lump sum and/or annuity stream.
Internal rate of return via Newton-Raphson. First cash flow is typically negative (investment).
Net present value of a cash flow series at a given discount rate.
Present value of a future lump sum and/or annuity stream.

params.title: Params
params.description: Strategy params. SMA: {fast,slow}. RSI: {period,oversold,overbought}. Momentum: {lookback}. Bollinger: {period,std}.

asset.title: Asset
asset.description: Crypto asset symbol (BTC, ETH, SOL...) — drives the live funding rate + carry

returns.title: Returns
returns.description: Daily return series for the asset (>=10) — drives VaR/CVaR + Kelly

equity_curve.title: Equity Curve
equity_curve.description: Equity curve (optional, derived from returns if omitted)

max_hedge_cost_pct.title: Max Hedge Cost Pct
max_hedge_cost_pct.description: Max hedge cost as fraction of position (0.05 = 5%)

asset.title: Asset
asset.description: Crypto asset symbol, e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL (USDT perp).

asset.title: Asset
asset.description: Crypto asset symbol, e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL (USD pair).

target_weights.title: Target Weights
target_weights.description: Asset symbol -> target weight (must sum to ~1.0)

transaction_cost_bps.title: Transaction Cost Bps
transaction_cost_bps.description: One-way transaction cost in bps (incl. spread + commission)

min_trade_usd.title: Min Trade Usd
min_trade_usd.description: Minimum trade size in USD (smaller drifts are ignored)

rate_shock_bps.title: Rate Shock Bps
rate_shock_bps.description: Interest rate shock in basis points

num_candidates.title: Num Candidates
num_candidates.description: Number of spread candidates to evaluate

strike_range_pct.title: Strike Range Pct
strike_range_pct.description: Strike range as fraction of spot

equity_curve.title: Equity Curve
equity_curve.description: Array of portfolio equity values over time

returns.title: Returns
returns.description: Named return series per asset, e.g. {"AAPL": [...], "MSFT": [...]}

S.title: S
S.description: Spot price of the underlying asset

steps.title: Steps
steps.description: Number of tree steps (1-200; default 100 textbook standard)

S.title: S
S.description: Spot price of the underlying asset

rebate.title: Rebate
rebate.description: Rebate paid if barrier is hit (for out) or not hit (for in)

S.title: S
S.description: Spot price of the underlying asset

averaging.title: Averaging

K.title: K
K.description: Fixed strike price (required for fixed lookback)

S_min.title: S Min
S_min.description: Minimum price observed so far (for floating call)

S_max.title: S Max
S_max.description: Maximum price observed so far (for floating put)

S.title: S
S.description: Spot price of the underlying asset

spot.title: Spot
spot.description: Current spot price of the underlying

market_data.title: Market Data
market_data.description: Array of implied vol data points

x.title: X
x.description: Independent variable(s): 1D array for simple, 2D for multiple regression

max_window.title: Max Window
max_window.description: Maximum R/S window size (defaults to len/2)

forecast_periods.title: Forecast Periods
forecast_periods.description: Number of periods to forecast ahead (max 252)

window.title: Window
window.description: Rolling window size (null for static z-scores)

threshold.title: Threshold
threshold.description: Z-score threshold for extreme value detection

data.title: Data
data.description: Array of data to fit distributions to

S.title: S
S.description: Spot price of the underlying asset

market_price.title: Market Price
market_price.description: Observed market price of the option

initial_price_ratio.title: Initial Price Ratio
initial_price_ratio.description: Initial price ratio of token A to token B

current_price_ratio.title: Current Price Ratio
current_price_ratio.description: Current price ratio of token A to token B

amm_type.title: Amm Type
amm_type.description: AMM type: v2 (full range) or v3 (concentrated)

rate.title: Rate
rate.description: The rate to convert (as decimal, e.g. 0.12 = 12%)

from_type.title: From Type
from_type.description: Input rate type to convert from

position_size.title: Position Size
position_size.description: Optional position size for P&L calculation

trade_amount.title: Trade Amount
trade_amount.description: Amount of input token to swap

total_tokens.title: Total Tokens

tge_pct.title: Tge Pct

actual_forward.title: Actual Forward

legs.title: Legs

S_range.title: S Range

points.title: Points

borrow_currency_rate.title: Borrow Currency Rate

invest_currency_rate.title: Invest Currency Rate

periods.title: Periods

initial_value.title: Initial Value
initial_value.description: Optional initial value for cumulative calculation

output_gap_pct.title: Output Gap Pct
output_gap_pct.description: Output gap as percentage of potential GDP

current_policy_rate.title: Current Policy Rate
current_policy_rate.description: Current policy rate for gap analysis

tips_yield.title: Tips Yield

portfolio_value.title: Portfolio Value

scenarios.title: Scenarios
scenarios.description: Array of stress scenarios to evaluate

price_range_pct.title: Price Range Pct
price_range_pct.description: Price range around spot for payoff calculation (percentage)

rates.title: Rates
rates.description: Array of known rates at each tenor

returns.title: Returns
returns.description: Array of periodic portfolio returns (e.g. daily), max 5000

benchmark_returns.title: Benchmark Returns
benchmark_returns.description: Optional benchmark return series for relative metrics

risk_free_rate.title: Risk Free Rate
risk_free_rate.description: Annual risk-free rate for Sharpe/Sortino calculation

num_std.title: Num Std
num_std.description: Number of standard deviations for bands

volatilities.title: Volatilities

commission_pct.title: Commission Pct

market_impact_bps.title: Market Impact Bps

benchmark_sharpe.title: Benchmark Sharpe

annualization_factor.title: Annualization Factor

payment_timing.title: Payment Timing
payment_timing.description: Payment at end or beginning of period

payment_timing.title: Payment Timing
payment_timing.description: Payment at end or beginning of period

cash_flows.title: Cash Flows
cash_flows.description: Array of cash flows (first is typically negative = initial investment)

cash_flows.title: Cash Flows
cash_flows.description: Array of future cash flows (period 1 onward)

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Calculation mode: discrete (win/loss) or continuous (return series)

win_rate.title: Win Rate
win_rate.description: Probability of winning (0-1), required for discrete mode

avg_win.title: Avg Win
avg_win.description: Average win amount, required for discrete mode

avg_loss.title: Avg Loss
avg_loss.description: Average loss amount (positive number), required for discrete mode

returns.title: Returns
returns.description: Array of historical returns, required for continuous mode

high.title: High
high.description: Optional array of high prices (for Parkinson/GK/YZ)

low.title: Low
low.description: Optional array of low prices (for Parkinson/GK/YZ)

open.title: Open
open.description: Optional array of opening prices (for GK/YZ)

simulations.title: Simulations
simulations.description: Number of Monte Carlo paths (100-2500; default 1000 matches industry standard)

withdrawal_rate.title: Withdrawal Rate
withdrawal_rate.description: Annual withdrawal rate as fraction of portfolio

prices.title: Prices
prices.description: Array of price data (e.g. closing prices)

volumes.title: Volumes
volumes.description: Optional array of volume data (same length as prices)

risk_per_trade.title: Risk Per Trade
risk_per_trade.description: Maximum risk per trade as fraction (e.g. 0.02 = 2%)

risk_per_trade.title: Risk Per Trade
risk_per_trade.description: Max risk per trade as fraction

implied_vol.title: Implied Vol
implied_vol.description: Implied volatility at this strike and expiry

asset.title: Asset
asset.description: Crypto asset symbol, e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL (USD pair)

collateral.title: Collateral
collateral.description: Collateral backing the position, in USD

webhook_url.title: Webhook Url
webhook_url.description: Public http(s) endpoint for HMAC-signed alert POSTs. Optional — status + alert history are always available via GET /v1/watch/{monitor_id}.

warn_pct.title: Warn Pct
warn_pct.description: Warn when liquidation distance falls below this percent

critical_pct.title: Critical Pct
critical_pct.description: Critical alert below this percent distance to liquidation

funding_flip.title: Funding Flip
funding_flip.description: Alert when the funding rate flips sign

vol_regime.title: Vol Regime
vol_regime.description: Alert when the realized-vol regime changes

collateral.title: Collateral
collateral.description: New collateral (USD) — set this after adding/removing margin

webhook_url.title: Webhook Url
webhook_url.description: New webhook URL; pass "" to remove the webhook
